scope: Selected tags are separated from dashboard score modifiers.
Selected tags only affect rune picker and recommendation comparison percent against the currently equipped rune.
The currently equipped rune always compares as 0.00 percent against itself.
Korean large-number formatting is applied only to DPS score and total expected damage.
Version display and cache keys are updated to v0.0010.

inverse_check.detail: Without selected tags, default combat value comparison is used. With selected tags, only rune comparison percent changes.

ui_check.detail: Static UI wiring confirms rune compare tags, rune search, empty rune selection, recommendation ranking, and dashboard number formatting.
ui_check.browser_note: Automatic file and localhost preview checks are blocked by the current browser policy in this environment.

connection_check.detail: index.html, app.js, core.js, and version.json are wired for v0.0010.

tests: Dashboard score unchanged by selected tags
Rune comparison percent changes when selected tags change
